scores.correctness_notes: The agent goes beyond the gold standard's interface-spec focus and provides accurate Python API details. IngressPerAppRequirer, port param, .url property, ready/revoked events, and metadata.yaml setup are all correct for the traefik-k8s v2 library.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, .url, .is_ready(), .on.ready, .on.revoked, and constructor kwargs (strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme) all exist in the real library
